INGREDIENTS:
<ul>
<li>butter (3/4 cup, 1.5 sticks)</li>
<li>brown sugar (3/4 cup, packed)</li>
<li>granulated sugar (1/2 cup)</li>
<li>eggs (2, large)</li>
<li>vanilla extract (2 tsp)</li>
<li>all-purpose flour (2 cups)</li>
<li>baking soda (1 tsp)</li>
<li>salt (1 tsp, flaky sea salt)</li>
<li>chocolate chips (12 oz, mix of dark and milk chocolate)</li>
<li>flaky sea salt</li>
</ul>

INSTRUCTIONS:
<h3 class="section-header">Brown the butter</h3>
<ol>
<li>In a <span class="cookware">saucepan</span>, melt <span class="ingredient" data-amount="3/4" data-unit="cup, 1.5 sticks">butter</span> over medium heat. Continue cooking, stirring frequently, until butter turns golden brown and smells nutty, about <span class="timer" data-value="5" data-unit="minutes">5 minutes</span>.</li>
<li>Transfer browned butter to a <span class="cookware">large</span> bowl and let cool for <span class="timer" data-value="10" data-unit="minutes">10 minutes</span>.</li>
</ol>
<h3 class="section-header">Make the dough</h3>
<ol>
<li>Add <span class="ingredient" data-amount="3/4" data-unit="cup, packed">brown sugar</span> and <span class="ingredient" data-amount="1/2" data-unit="cup">granulated sugar</span> to the cooled butter. Whisk until combined.</li>
<li>Add <span class="ingredient" data-amount="2, large" data-unit="">eggs</span> and <span class="ingredient" data-amount="2" data-unit="tsp">vanilla extract</span>, whisking until smooth.</li>
<li>In a separate <span class="cookware">bowl</span>, whisk together <span class="ingredient" data-amount="2" data-unit="cups">all-purpose flour</span>, <span class="ingredient" data-amount="1" data-unit="tsp">baking soda</span>, and <span class="ingredient" data-amount="1" data-unit="tsp, flaky sea salt">salt</span>.</li>
<li>Fold dry ingredients into wet ingredients until just combined. Fold in <span class="ingredient" data-amount="12" data-unit="oz, mix of dark and milk chocolate">chocolate chips</span>.</li>
</ol>
<h3 class="section-header">Bake</h3>
<ol>
<li>Preheat <span class="cookware">oven</span> to 375°F (190°C). Line <span class="cookware">baking</span> sheets with parchment paper.</li>
<li>Scoop dough into 2 tablespoon-sized balls and place on prepared baking sheets, spacing them 3 inches apart.</li>
<li>Bake for <span class="timer" data-value="11-13" data-unit="minutes">11-13 minutes</span> until edges are golden brown but centers still look slightly underdone.</li>
<li>Let cool on baking sheet for <span class="timer" data-value="5" data-unit="minutes">5 minutes</span>, then transfer to a <span class="cookware">wire</span> rack.</li>
<li>Sprinkle with extra <span class="ingredient">flaky sea salt</span> while still warm, if desired.</li>
</ol>
